milestone_brief: Lift the CONTEXT.md §9 deferral of the render-busy spinner icon during mesh generation. The original blocker — "QMovie.updated signals can fire during QApplication.processEvents() in _render_current, touching the AI-9 re-entrancy surface" — is OBSOLETE: realtime-variety-render-e4 moved surface.generate() onto a QThreadPool worker (MeshWorker in render_worker.py, dispatched at app.py:592-594 via QueuedConnection), so the spinner can no longer race with synchronous mesh generation on the GUI thread. The status bar already shows "Computing {surface.label}{_hq_label}…" via self.statusBar().showMessage in _render_current; the spinner is a visual companion (left of the status text) that pulses while self._computing == True and hides on idle. Scope: app.py (add a QLabel for the spinner widget; show/hide in _on_mesh_started / _on_mesh_ready or via a self._computing setter; left-align in the QStatusBar permanent-widget slot to avoid being clipped by the long bbox/timing message); icons.py (add a render_busy_spinner_icon factory using qtawesome qta.icon with animation=qta.Spin(widget) — the standard qtawesome spin pattern; pin the same mdi6 icon family used elsewhere for visual coherence — mdi6.loading or mdi6.sync are the natural picks). The spinner MUST stay AI-9-safe — no processEvents calls in the show/hide path; no signal connection that re-enters _render_current. Pure visual feedback. Tests: pure-Python source-text greps (AI-2) asserting the spinner widget is constructed, added to the status bar as a permanent widget (not a temporary message), and toggled via the _computing setter; off-screen render NOT applicable (status-bar widget is Qt-chrome, not a VTK render path). AI-15 honesty: the spinner indicates compute activity, not progress (mesh generation is opaque — no percent-complete signal). The status-bar text already gives ground truth.
research_synthesis: AI-9 blocker confirmed OBSOLETE (zero processEvents in render path post-realtime-variety-render-e4; surface.generate runs on QThreadPool worker). LOAD-BEARING researcher catches: (1) widget MUST be QPushButton(flat=True, disabled), NOT QLabel — qtawesome Spin animation requires QIcon.paint() in paintEvent which only QAbstractButton subclasses call; (2) position MUST be addPermanentWidget (right side), NOT addWidget — addWidget gets obscured by showMessage which fires on every render event. Icon mdi6.loading + qta.Spin(widget, interval=10, step=6) = 600ms/rotation. Toggle at app.py:670 (self._computing=True) + app.py:829 (self._computing=False in _on_mesh_ready finally). Theme refresh wired at MainWindow.__init__ and theme-change handlers. 6 new source-grep tests in tests/test_render_busy_spinner.py. CONTEXT.md §9 paragraph replaced; icons.py deferral comment replaced. ~135-150 LOC inline.
